disclaimer: Engineering layout simulator dataset for ASR-ENG-001 Rev B. All placements and every value flagged provisional are design-basis assumptions for layout study only. TBD items are not approved for procurement. Do not use provisional dimensions for manufacturing.

components.name: Main structural chassis
components.description: Custom welded/bolted base frame (6061-T6 aluminium candidate). Modelled as floor plate, two side rails and two bulkheads; the front bulkhead has a right-side cutout as a harness pass-through / PDU lug access opening. Final dimensions depend on mass, wheelbase, track and CG analysis (DEC-003/DEC-004).
components.sourceNote: No released drawing exists. 900 x 560 mm footprint and 90 mm ground clearance are layout assumptions only.

massKg.source: Assumed for a 900 x 560 aluminium frame; no FEA or drawing released.

cooling.notes: Frame acts as heat-spreading path for controller cold plates (ASR-047).

service.interval: Annual structural inspection; torque checks monthly (spec 22.1).
service.notes: Lifting points must be rated for final mass; do not lift from mast.

components.name: Outer equipment enclosure
components.description: Low faceted IP65/IP67-target enclosure with a hollow vertical lower tub, outward shoulder break, inward-tapered upper armour, angular wheel covers, joined front/rear fascia modules, continuous sealed deck and perimeter rail. Wall construction, glands, tolerances and final latch hardware remain provisional.
components.sourceNote: The 900 x 590 x 225 mm body basis and all armour surfacing are concept-image-derived layout assumptions cross-checked against Autonomous_Security_Robot_Exterior_Body_Geometry.md. IP target, material stack and released interfaces remain open decisions (G-09).

cooling.notes: Thermal model TBD (R-10). Pressure-equalisation vents ASR-035.

service.notes: Autonomy must be disabled while covers are open (SR-012).

components.name: Hub motor wheel — front left
components.description: Brushless hub motor wheel, 10 x 2.5 in pneumatic tyre, 3-phase BLDC with Hall sensors. Manufacturer, rating, phase current, axle geometry and pole pairs are unverified (release gate G-01).
components.sourceNote: BOM ASR-001: 'Do not assume ratings'. Tyre OD 254 mm is nominal. The 90 mm rendered tyre width is photo-derived; the 132 mm assembly envelope includes provisional axle hardware and cable bend. Measure the installed wheel before release.

massKg.source: Typical for 10-in hub motor assembly; not weighed.

typicalW.source: Power budget: 500 W-class design basis only.

peakW.source: Power budget provisional peak; verify by characterization (TST-002).

cooling.notes: Thermal limit unknown until motor characterization (spec 7.1).

service.interval: Pre-patrol tyre/axle check; monthly torque check.
service.notes: Dual torque arms per motor (ASR-018); locking axle hardware (ASR-019).

components.name: Hub motor wheel — front right
components.description: Brushless hub motor wheel, 10 x 2.5 in pneumatic tyre, 3-phase BLDC with Hall sensors. Manufacturer, rating, phase current, axle geometry and pole pairs are unverified (release gate G-01).
components.sourceNote: BOM ASR-001: 'Do not assume ratings'. Tyre OD 254 mm is nominal. The 90 mm rendered tyre width is photo-derived; the 132 mm assembly envelope includes provisional axle hardware and cable bend. Measure the installed wheel before release.

massKg.source: Typical for 10-in hub motor assembly; not weighed.

typicalW.source: Power budget: 500 W-class design basis only.

peakW.source: Power budget provisional peak; verify by characterization (TST-002).

cooling.notes: Thermal limit unknown until motor characterization (spec 7.1).

service.interval: Pre-patrol tyre/axle check; monthly torque check.
service.notes: Dual torque arms per motor (ASR-018); locking axle hardware (ASR-019).

components.description: Brushless hub motor wheel, 10 x 2.5 in pneumatic tyre, 3-phase BLDC with Hall sensors. Manufacturer, rating, phase current, axle geometry and pole pairs are unverified (release gate G-01).
components.sourceNote: BOM ASR-001: 'Do not assume ratings'. Tyre OD 254 mm is nominal. The 90 mm rendered tyre width is photo-derived; the 132 mm assembly envelope includes provisional axle hardware and cable bend. Measure the installed wheel before release.

components.name: Hub motor wheel — rear right
components.description: Brushless hub motor wheel, 10 x 2.5 in pneumatic tyre, 3-phase BLDC with Hall sensors. Manufacturer, rating, phase current, axle geometry and pole pairs are unverified (release gate G-01).
components.sourceNote: BOM ASR-001: 'Do not assume ratings'. Tyre OD 254 mm is nominal. The 90 mm rendered tyre width is photo-derived; the 132 mm assembly envelope includes provisional axle hardware and cable bend. Measure the installed wheel before release.

massKg.source: Typical for 10-in hub motor assembly; not weighed.

typicalW.source: Power budget: 500 W-class design basis only.

components.name: Traction battery pack (16S LiFePO4)
components.description: 48 V-class traction pack: 16S LiFePO4, 51.2 V nominal, provisional 60 Ah / 3.07 kWh, integrated BMS (ASR-065). Pack vendor, cell format, enclosure and exact dimensions are unselected (release gate G-04).
components.sourceNote: Capacity and chemistry from BOM ASR-064 provisional basis. A 350 x 250 x 165 mm low-profile packaging envelope is now required to clear the sealed deck; vendor selection and measured interfaces remain release-gate G-04.

massKg.source: Typical 16S 60 Ah LiFePO4 pack range 28-34 kg; not weighed.

typicalW.source: Energy source, not a load. Usable energy approx 2211.8 Wh (Appendix A planning number).

cooling.notes: 4x temperature probes (ASR-095); charging below approved temperature requires heater option (ASR-094).

service.notes: Service disconnect (ASR-067) and main fuse (ASR-066) live at pack positive. Vendor-authorized service only.

components.name: NVIDIA Jetson AGX Orin 64GB Developer Kit
components.description: Edge AI computer (P/N 945-13730-0057-000). Phase 1 primary compute running ROS 2 / Nav2 / YOLO. Production robot should move to a rugged carrier (ASR-099).
components.sourceNote: Dev kit external dimensions 110 x 110 x 71.65 mm per NVIDIA documentation. Mounted-orientation and bracket stack-up not yet designed.

massKg.source: NVIDIA Jetson AGX Orin Developer Kit mechanical specification: approximately 872.5 g.

typicalW.source: Power budget row: monitored power mode.

peakW.source: Power budget row; validate brownout margin (TST-004).

cooling.notes: Sealed-enclosure thermal headroom must be validated (ASR-100, TST-020). Airflow keep-out above unit.

service.interval: Quarterly software/security review; fan check weekly.
service.notes: Pre-imaged spare storage recommended (spec 22.2). Vibration isolation mounts ASR-032.

components.name: Motor controller A (dual-channel BLDC)
components.description: Dual-channel industrial BLDC controller for left wheel pair. 60 V class, Hall + encoder input, CAN, regenerative braking, STO. Candidate: Roboteq FBLG2360T-class; final selection is blocked by motor characterization (G-01/G-05).
components.sourceNote: Master BOM candidate Roboteq FBLG2360T vendor envelope 140 x 140 x 25 mm. References sheet says SBLG2360TS and must be reconciled before procurement or hole-pattern release.

massKg.source: Typical for candidate class; final model TBD.

typicalW.source: Controller losses only; traction power passes through to motors.

peakW.source: Loss estimate at peak current; verify after motor test.

cooling.notes: Thermal plate path to chassis; verify with thermal soak TST-020.

service.notes: STO wiring is part of the independent safety chain (IO-007) — protected routing per SR-014.

components.name: Motor controller B (dual-channel BLDC)
components.description: Dual-channel industrial BLDC controller for right wheel pair. 60 V class, Hall + encoder input, CAN, regenerative braking, STO. Candidate: Roboteq FBLG2360T-class; final selection is blocked by motor characterization (G-01/G-05).
components.sourceNote: Master BOM candidate Roboteq FBLG2360T vendor envelope 140 x 140 x 25 mm. References sheet says SBLG2360TS and must be reconciled before procurement or hole-pattern release.

massKg.source: Typical for candidate class; final model TBD.

typicalW.source: Controller losses only; traction power passes through to motors.

peakW.source: Loss estimate at peak current; verify after motor test.

cooling.notes: Thermal plate path to chassis; verify with thermal soak TST-020.

service.notes: STO wiring is part of the independent safety chain (IO-007) — protected routing per SR-014.

components.name: DC-DC converter 48-19 V (Jetson)
components.description: Isolated or low-noise 48 V to 19 V converter, >=120 W continuous with surge margin and remote enable. Feeds the Jetson compute branch. Model unselected.
components.sourceNote: Envelope assumed from typical 120-150 W industrial brick converters. Input range must span full battery voltage (42-58.4 V).

massKg.source: Typical industrial converter brick; model TBD.

typicalW.source: Conversion loss estimate at 45 W load, ~85-90% efficiency.

cooling.notes: Derate per datasheet at enclosure temperature; verify in TST-020.

service.notes: Brownout at traction transients must not reboot compute (TST-004, R-03).

components.name: DC-DC converter 48-24 V (safety/aux)
components.description: 48 V to 24 V converter, 10-15 A, for safety controller, relays, LiDAR rail, router and accessories. Stacked above the 48-19 V converter on standoffs. Model unselected.
components.sourceNote: Envelope assumed from typical 250-350 W industrial converters.

massKg.source: Typical industrial converter brick; model TBD.

typicalW.source: Conversion loss estimate for aux rail loads.

cooling.notes: Derate per datasheet at enclosure temperature; verify in TST-020.

service.notes: 24 V safety branch requires dedicated availability-oriented protection (spec 17.2).

components.name: Power distribution & fuse module
components.description: Combined representation of the protected distribution group: positive/negative busbars (ASR-072/073), motor branch fuses (ASR-074), auxiliary fuse block (ASR-075), main contactor + precharge (ASR-068/069/070) and current sensor (ASR-071). Finger-safe covers required.
components.sourceNote: Modelled as one block for layout study. Actual DIN-rail panel layout (ASR-015) is a separate mechanical design output.

massKg.source: Sum of typical busbar/fuse/contactor masses; not designed.

peakW.source: Peak-current I2R loss estimate; fuse schedule TBD (spec 17.2).

cooling.notes: Busbar sizing after prospective fault-current analysis.

service.access: Front connector face + top service clearance
service.interval: Weekly visual; monthly torque check on lugs.
service.notes: Main fuse must sit close to battery positive (spec 8.4). Spare fuse kit ASR-096.

components.name: LTE/5G router-modem
components.description: Industrial dual-SIM 5G/LTE router, 9-36 VDC on the 24 V aux rail. Provides the secure outbound VPN tunnel (Tailscale overlay, CR-001). Model and carrier plan unselected (G-08). Mounted on standoffs above motor controller A.
components.sourceNote: Envelope assumed from typical industrial 5G routers (~130 x 95 x 35 mm). RF bay location TBD.

typicalW.source: Power budget row: 5G router 15 W typical.

cooling.notes: Keep away from controller heat spreaders; verify in thermal soak.

service.access: Electronics bay service panel; SIM tray access required
service.notes: Management plane locked down; no direct WAN exposure of cameras (CR-001).

components.name: PTZ camera + mast (Amcrest IP8M-2899EW-AI-V2)
components.description: 4K/8MP PTZ, 25x optical zoom, PoE+, IP66, RTSP/ONVIF. Modelled together with its mast (ASR-027) as one assembly. Surveillance/teleoperation only — not a navigation or safety sensor. Network hardening required (R-13).
components.sourceNote: Purchased Amcrest camera is 160 mm diameter x 270.5 mm high and 2.60 kg; included PFB305W arm is approximately 202.5 x 115 x 160 mm. This upright concept mast is a provisional custom adapter and must be measured/released before fabrication.

massKg.source: 2.60 kg camera + approximately 0.87 kg supplied arm + 1.7 kg provisional mast/base allowance.

typicalW.source: Power budget: full PoE+ class budgeted until measured.

cooling.notes: Solar load and washdown behaviour TBD (ER-004/ER-007).

service.interval: Weekly lens clean; quarterly PTZ range test (TST-017).
service.notes: Mast raises CG — rollover review R-16. Do not lift robot by the mast.

components.name: Front depth camera (Intel RealSense D435i)
components.description: Wide-FOV active stereo depth camera with IMU, USB 3. Near-field perception and visual odometry experiments on the front lower sensor bar (ASR-028). Not safety-rated.
components.sourceNote: Camera body approx 90 x 25 x 25 mm per Intel datasheet. Sensor-bar bracket and pitch adjustment not yet designed.

peakW.source: Power budget row; measure actual USB draw and cable drop.

cooling.notes: Monitor housing temperature in direct sun; weather hood ASR-031.

service.notes: Locking short USB cable + industrial hub required (R-14). Extrinsic calibration stored per chassis serial (spec 9.1).

components.name: 3D LiDAR (Livox MID-360)
components.description: 360-degree non-repetitive scanning LiDAR, 9-27 VDC, IP67, integrated IMU. Primary mapping/localization sensor on a rigid riser near vehicle centre (ASR-026). Not a safety-rated protective scanner.
components.sourceNote: Livox MID-360 body is 65 x 65 x 60 mm (connector side reaches about 73 mm), 265 g, with four M3 holes 5 mm deep. The 40 mm riser and its 84 mm adapter footprint are provisional.

peakW.source: BOM ASR-004: cold self-heating peak up to 14 W.

service.interval: Pre-patrol window clean; quarterly calibration verification.
service.notes: Time sync via PTP; calibrated base_link transform stored per serial (spec 9.1).

components.name: Optional cellular diversity antenna — not installed
components.description: Optional second whip retained in the engineering dataset for RF studies but not installed or shown in the default production presentation.
components.sourceNote: Generic 200 mm whip placeholder. Final antenna set defined by router selection and RF separation requirements (ASR-030).

service.notes: Protected cable routing through gland; drip loop required (spec 6.3).

components.name: Primary cellular antenna
components.description: Single installed whip antenna for the 5G/LTE router on the sealed rear deck hardpoint. Antenna model and gain remain TBD.
components.sourceNote: Generic 200 mm whip placeholder. Final antenna set defined by router selection and RF separation requirements (ASR-030).

service.notes: Protected cable routing through gland; drip loop required (spec 6.3).
